name: agent-safety
description: Proactive safety constraints for AI coding agents. Enforced before any action, not learned from failures.

constraints.reason: Force push destroys remote history. Use incremental commits instead.
Hard reset discards uncommitted work. Stash or commit first.
Recursive delete at root or parent directory is catastrophic.
Secrets, API keys, and private keys must not appear in code or commits.
Skipping git hooks or GPG signing bypasses safety checks.
Destructive database operations require explicit operator approval.

invariants.reason: Tests must run before committing. Run npm test first.
Tests must pass before pushing to remote.
